Make them draw 5 card and lock
If you want to build a Clem centered team, you can also use lily or aigis
the bleed or the multi hit
forcing your enemy to draw 5 seems...

1 cost into exalt is a complete hand denial
and free damage from exalt plus bleed
youd more than likely use it when they have near a full hand too

its literally just to punish people for holding cards

on equip all enemy cards gainba status thatll discard it an end turn
at every turn start after, one enemy card will gain this status

Clem in pve is probably more mid then pvp

punishing holding cards and having forced discards is major cancer for most meta comps rn

or just have enough burst to not gaf

if anything clem should fodder the shit out of sanga in late game
at least clem doesnt force you to draw cards of a specific awaker

if its pure silver then you can just fucking discard her shit
her slot is contested by a lot of good units
She should have been an attacker instead of supporter
every card of hers is offensive
Sign, you can't make her the same team as other supporter
purple does not always mean supportive
Doesn't matter since you need other supporter unit
i still dont understand what you're saying
shes meant to be the damage carry of a team
what do you mean weird lol
You CANT synce her with other supporter
how do you support her as the main damage carry though?
those things are not limited to purple units
i dont know what your point is, im saying shes a damage carry thats literally all there is to it
karen would be a pretty good support since she can give her a lot of buffs
Not even hard to understand what I mean
you're saying she lacks supports but thats not even true
You just try to don't understand it
ok what does that mean then
does she lack support cuz i already gave a few examples of what you can use
And who gonna purified the slow, blood effect and enemy shield then
the unit that literally everyone gets for free
clem cards are very inexpensive so slow is not a big threat to her
They applied it on 4 char on your team and you say doll
Who dispell enemy shield and delay heal then?
mass bleed is not nearly as threatening as you think it is. unless its a very late game situation its still manageable
You must be understand it now
Compare her to other dps then

she shuts down lotan and helot which are very common teams with the forced discard the only bad match up i can really see is the uvhash hat comp where your cards are constantly getting shuffled around
she doesnt really care about paralysis either
so tulu isnt that threatening unless you go very late
Like you can do that all the time
They will force you to attack other unit first
If anything possible, paralize is better on  Lotan
well yea not everything is going to be static people will adjust to her
but rn she has very good potential to be anti meta and its weird that you're saying otherwise
all of the things you mentioned are things that every team has to deal with
I said she doesn't fit her role
ok and what is that then
I won't keep up with that
im trying to undersyand your thought process because its quite obvious that she is designed to be a damage unit with disruption through discard and bleed pressure
Yellow fit her better if you looks through it
im not disagreeing that she does fit better as yellow but purple fits too
hey that traphase kit looks funner than her base kit
well, clementine in pvp looks horrifying
